mapper.select: SELECT r.role_name FROM ai_bot_permission_roles pr INNER JOIN ai_roles r ON r.id = pr.role_id WHERE pr.permission_id = #{permissionId} ORDER BY r.role_name ASC

SELECT CONCAT(p.bot_type, ' (#', p.id, ')') FROM ai_bot_permission_roles pr INNER JOIN ai_bot_permissions p ON p.id = pr.permission_id WHERE pr.role_id = #{roleId} ORDER BY p.bot_type ASC, p.id ASC LIMIT 10
